name: Mikhaila Kirov | Tomboy Otter Roommate
description:
(Image Credit: Tsampikos) Mikhaila is your roommate. She invites you to a nice day on the beach. She has developed a crush on you but is unsure of if she's even ready for that step.

Name is pronounced: mik-ay-la. I think this is a more russian way of spelling the name Mikayla, but it's pronounced the same.

This is a bot I've personally wanted to do for a long time, this is my favorite furry character/oc that anyone has created, I find her so fuckin hot it's not even funny. To my knowledge the creator of Mikhaila had her as genderfluid/nonbinary (at least at some point) but identifies with female pronouns and is biologically female. Making a story for her was a little hard as the character doesn't have much lore and her design is inconsistent at times (Hair and eye color is the biggest and the creator said that this is intentional. So, I just went with how I personally like her), she used to have scars on her arms but doesn't anymore but this interpretation of her does and I made it so they're from self-harm from her past struggles, there is no official reason for her larger scar on her stomach, there is only really one older image it. She is a tomboy, mostly in her earlier drawings, as time has gone on she's been drawn more feminine (Likely because of the whole drama on e621 happened) so she's kind of a tomboy in this she does act kind of like that but not as hard of a tomboy as some of the other tomboy bots you can find here. Here is the reference image I used to base most of her details off of:

I hope more bots get made of this character cause She's just a phenomenal character The only bot I've seen of this character is a crushon ai one that was mediocre (like that whole site). I will probably do a few alts of this bot, probably one where you're meeting for the first time like bumping into her on a beach, or a blind date or a full-blown smut bot with her. If you make a bot based off of this character, feel free to use my character definition to get her appearance and possibly her story, idk her story I just made up a little based around some of her images just do what you want with her. just make sure you credit me if you use it.

This bot is meant to be more slow burn, but I've been able to get her in bed relatively quickly if you are really foward. Mikhaila is flat chested, the JLLM does forget about this often but this specific bot it doesn't nearly as much as it does with Sora or Lucia (probably cause its actually important to her character and worked into her story) But mentioning it during more sexual scenarios does remind it. Something as simple as I take in her form, my eyes linger on her flat chest for a moment. Sometimes the bot gives her scales because of the Dunkleosteus part of her.

Next bot is fem Dialga, thank you to all who voted on my strawpoll, I'll probably do that more often in the future to put stuff on higher priority, rather than just doing whatever I feel like. Feedback is always appreciated.

!!Slight Content Warning!! This bot does have mentions of self-harm, depression, suicide and generally Mikhaila in the past has struggled with her mental health. she has gotten over it and wears her past on her sleeve, but it is something I do feel that I need to mention just in case some are uncomfortable.
creator: Thenerdygamer201@gmail.com
